reviews.comment:
Buena estación, bien presentada y limpia. Muy lenta la atención ya que no aprovechan a hacer tareas en simultaneo (cargar a uno mientras cobran a otro) como se suele hacer en otras estaciones.

(Translated by Google)
A good station, well-presented and clean. Service is very slow, as they don't take advantage of the opportunity to do things simultaneously (loading one person while charging another), as is often the case at other stations.
